title: Kerala CPI(M) leader P. Jayarajan says he visited Kodungalloor temple as part of research for book, not for darshan
description: He dismisses ‘misconceptions’ about communists' visit to places of worship. He says a chapter in his new book Sanathanikalude Hindutva Vazhikal examines non-Brahmanical ritual practices and Kodungalloor Kavu is one such important site
